'''鈭歮-n-ch-r''' ('''kamancheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rigorise|rigorise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rigorise|rigorise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-n-ch-r
|-
! Lemma
| kamancheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimancheroko|thimancheroko]] || [[word:jimancheroko|jimancheroko]] || [[word:shimancheroko|shimancheroko]] || [[word:kimancheroko|kimancheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumancheroko|thuthumancheroko]] || [[word:jujumancheroko|jujumancheroko]] || [[word:shushumancheroko|shushumancheroko]] || [[word:kukumancheroko|kukumancheroko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themancheroko|themancheroko]] || [[word:jemancheroko|jemancheroko]] || [[word:shemancheroko|shemancheroko]] || [[word:kemancheroko|kemancheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomancheroko|thothomancheroko]] || [[word:jojomancheroko|jojomancheroko]] || [[word:shoshomancheroko|shoshomancheroko]] || [[word:kokomancheroko|kokomancheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomancheroko|thomancheroko]] || [[word:jomancheroko|jomancheroko]] || [[word:shomancheroko|shomancheroko]] || [[word:komancheroko|komancheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomancheroko|thomancheroko]] || [[word:jomancheroko|jomancheroko]] || [[word:shomancheroko|shomancheroko]] || [[word:komancheroko|komancheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mancheroko|th忙mancheroko]] || [[word:j忙mancheroko|j忙mancheroko]] || [[word:sh忙mancheroko|sh忙mancheroko]] || [[word:k忙mancheroko|k忙mancheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamancheroko|thathamancheroko]] || [[word:jajamancheroko|jajamancheroko]] || [[word:shashamancheroko|shashamancheroko]] || [[word:kakamancheroko|kakamancheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamancheroko|thamancheroko]] || [[word:jamancheroko|jamancheroko]] || [[word:shamancheroko|shamancheroko]] || [[word:kamancheroko|kamancheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamancheroko|thamancheroko]] || [[word:jamancheroko|jamancheroko]] || [[word:shamancheroko|shamancheroko]] || [[word:kamancheroko|kamancheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
